title: Shards (disambiguation)
content:
'''Shards''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Shards (Carajam)|'''Shards''']] found on [[Carajam]]

==Out of Universe==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan]]'': the seventh [[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights|''Young Jedi Knights'']] novel.
*''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 2: Shards]]'': The second ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' trade paperback.

See also [[Shard (disambiguation)]].
